pre.style: background:var(--color-background-secondary); border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary); border-radius:8px; padding:1rem; font-size:11px; font-family:monospace; overflow-x:auto; white-space:pre; line-height:1.6; color:var(--color-text-primary); margin:0;

div.pre: <svg width="200" height="231" viewBox="0 0 200 231" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <defs> <linearGradient id="bggrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"> <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a237e"/> <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0d47a1"/> </linearGradient> </defs> <polygon points="100,5 191,55 191,155 100,205 9,155 9,55" fill="url(#bggrad)" stroke="#42a5f5" stroke-width="4"/> <polygon points="100,18 179,63 179,148 100,193 21,148 21,63" fill="none" stroke="#1565c0" stroke-width="1.5"/> <path d="M 38,148 Q 55,148 65,120 Q 75,92 100,82 Q 125,92 135,120 Q 145,148 162,148" fill="none" stroke="#90caf9" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/> <line x1="35" y1="148" x2="165" y2="148" stroke="#42a5f5" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/> <path d="M 38,148 Q 55,148 65,120 Q 75,92 100,82 Q 125,92 135,120 Q 145,148 162,148 Z" fill="#1565c0" fill-opacity="0.35"/> <line x1="100" y1="84" x2="100" y2="148" stroke="#42a5f5" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/> <text x="100" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e3f2fd" font-size="15" font-weight="700" font-family="'Courier New', monospace" letter-spacing="2">bayprior</text> <text x="100" y="178" text-anchor="middle" fill="#90caf9" font-size="9.5" font-family="'Courier New', monospace" letter-spacing="1">PRIOR ELICITATION</text> </svg>
